collections.name: The Village Collection
collections.description: The Village Collection at The Enclave offers freehold back-to-back townhomes with no monthly maintenance fees — the most attainable way into Milton's newest Sundial Homes community. Five thoughtfully sized layouts from 953 to 1,732 sq ft suit first-time buyers, young families, and investors looking for low-maintenance freehold ownership. Register for the full Village Collection floor plans and current pricing.

collections.name: The Park Collection
collections.description: The Park Collection features freehold traditional townhomes in two and three storey designs, ranging from 1,240 to 2,843 sq ft. With layouts scaled for growing and multigenerational families — including spacious three-storey end and corner homes — and no monthly maintenance fees, the Park Collection delivers detached-style space at townhome value in southeast Milton. Register for the complete Park Collection floor plans and pricing.
collections.footnote: Square-foot ranges reflect different elevations of the same model across blocks.
